videos.title: Who wins this week? | Genesis Scottish Open Preview
videos.summary_source_text:
Who wins this week? | Genesis Scottish Open Preview Iona Stephen goes behind the scenes to bring an exclusive preview to the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open, looking back on the season and ahead to the second Rolex Series event, ahead of the final Major Championship of the year.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: The Other Guys Lift Texas Rangers To Series-Opening Win Against Angels | DLLS Rangers
videos.summary_source_text:
The Other Guys Lift Texas Rangers To Series-Opening Win Against Angels | DLLS Rangers Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

An ALLCITY Network Production

The Texas Rangers snapped a two-game losing streak and pushed the Angels’ losing streak to seven with an 8-3 victory Tuesday night at Globe Life Field. Jacob deGrom pitched well over five innings before leaving with a hip injury that he said will not prevent him from making his next start. The Rangers got big offensive contributions from Justin Foscue, who hit a pinch-hit homer and drove in another run in a five-run eighth, and Alejandro Osuna, who hit a three-run homer to cap the big eighth. Nicky Lopez and Ezequiel Duran also delivered. No one was expecting that foursome to be key contributors for the Rangers, but they are and their contributions have been welcomed.

videos.title: 08.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
08.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. Grok 4.5 First Look: 8 Game Builds, Benchmarks vs Opus 4.8 & Best Workflow Uses

The script reviews the newly released Grok 4.5, noting it’s free to try and showing results from eight game builds tracked on Goldy Bench, with seven good outputs and one poor one. The presenter demos multiple genres (open-world RPGs, racing, voxel/Minecraft-like) and comments on graphics, physics, controls, occasional bugs, and smoothness, plus the benefit of access via an existing X/Twitter subscription. They compare Grok 4.5 against models like Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, finding Fable 5 often higher quality while Grok 4.5 sometimes matches or beats Opus 4.8, including cases where Opus fails to generate. The script also shows Grok 4.5 integrated into Hermes/Agent OS, CLI, and studio workflows for images, video, and news-driven automations, and mentions token efficiency, real-time Twitter news access, and community resources.

videos.title: Build an AI Agent That Runs 24/7 With Tank
videos.summary_source_text:
Build an AI Agent That Runs 24/7 With Tank Get Tank - join the community 👉 https://mrc.fm/cmc

Most people run an AI prompt, get an answer and close the tab. But the real magic is an agent that keeps working when you don't: pulling the news into a daily blog draft, watching listings, running scheduled jobs all night while you sleep. In this stream I'll build one live with Tank, a self-hosted AI worker that lives on your own box and never leaves your data behind. We'll wire it to a schedule, hand it a real recurring task, and cover the bit everyone asks about: how to set it, trust it and walk away without babysitting a terminal. If you've ever wanted your own AI employee that just gets on with it, this is the build.

videos.title: Best Amateur in a DECADE?! Preview of the Genesis Scottish Open | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Best Amateur in a DECADE?! Preview of the Genesis Scottish Open | The Drop The Drop gets you ready for the PGA TOUR’s annual trip across the Atlantic Ocean for the Genesis Scottish Open and The Open Championship. We’ll preview all the action at The Renaissance Club by discussing previous winners, Scottie Scheffler’s chances at his second win of the season and this week’s edition of The Champion’s Hole– where stats and history tell us which hole a player must excel on if he wants to lift a trophy on Sunday. We also preview the ISCO Championship, where young stars like Jackson Koivun, Ben James and Miles Russell will tee it up. We are joined by Data Golf co-founder Matt Courchene, who tells us why his popular website ranks Jackson Koivun as the top incoming prospect since 2010. Finally, just because the 4th of July behind us doesn’t mean you still can’t fire up the grill as summer unfolds… We went around and asked players what toppings make for the perfect hot dog!

videos.title: What Does Eating "Healthy" Really Looks Like?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Does Eating "Healthy" Really Looks Like? Healthy eating doesn't have to be complicated. Start with real, nutrient-dense foods that are as close to their natural state as possible. Fresh vegetables, quality proteins, and simple ingredients can go a long way. Organic is great when it's an option, but choosing real food is more important than settling for any processed foods.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. He is also the founder and medical director of Cardiovascular Interventions, PA, where since 1990 he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor. Throughout his distinguished career, he has performed thousands of interventional procedures in both hospital and outpatient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease. He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Healthy eating doesn't have to be complicated. videos.title: What Is The Difference Between A Crossover and Crossunder?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Is The Difference Between A Crossover and Crossunder? If you play hockey, someone has told you to cross over more. It's the most repeated skating cue there is, and it builds the wrong habit.

Here's what the cue misses. When you lift your inside leg up and over the midline, that leg isn't producing anything, it's just repositioning your feet. Driving with your over leg as opposed to your underleg is where you give up your leverage in the mechanic. The motion that feels like effort is the motion doing the least work.

The mechanical advantage lives in the other leg. When Connor McDavid crosses, his outside leg pulls under his body and drives him sideways before the inside leg ever comes over. Generating the movement from your outside leg takes more energy and more effort. Under the body gives you speed and the hip twist allows for a more mechanically efficient crossunder.

This is why McDavid pulls away from players who look like they're skating just as hard. They're crossing over. He's crossing under. Same shape to the eye, a different engine entirely, and it's the reason we teach it with this language to help players better understand the mechanic.

Anyone Can Make Insane Visual Effects Now! How to add AI visual effects to your videos without making everything look AI-generated.

Every Friday, my news videos start with some wild AI intro and it's the thing I get asked about the most. This is the full breakdown of how I do it, plus every other AI effect I use to keep my videos fun.

Intros, transitions, background compositing, B-roll, logo reveals, lower thirds, animated infographics, and the animated talking heads trick from the Sam Altman video. I jump between Runway, Seed Dance 2.0, Gemini, Veo 3.1, Remotion, and Codex throughout.

videos.summary_source_text:
Danny Scudero, Cree Thomas and Zach Atkins join the show from Big 12 Media Day On today’s DNVR Buffs Podcast, the squad is joined by Colorado players Danny Scudero, Cree Thomas and Zach Atkins from Big 12 Media Day in Frisco, TX! Ryan Koenigsberg, Jake Schwanitz and Scott Procter also discuss their biggest takeaways and storylines from Big 12 Media Day including Julian Lewis’ comments about Colorado’s offense last season, Texas Tech and the Brendan Sorsby situation, the preseason Big 12 team including zero Colorado players and more. Discussing four-star OT Dewey Young’s commitment to Colorado and much more.

videos.title: What Type Of Player Is Mikko Rantanen With The Dallas Stars? | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
What Type Of Player Is Mikko Rantanen With The Dallas Stars? | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

Dallas Stars forward Mikko Rantanen is a superstar. He has been a top player in the NHL for a long time, won a Stanley Cup with the Colorado Avalanche, and can light up a scoresheet. But because of a late-season trade in 2025 and a lingering injury last season, we haven’t seen his full potential yet with Dallas. Which version of Rantanen will the Stars get this season and beyond? Sam Nestler and Craig Ludwig are here to talk it all out.

Tim Legler on If LeBron's BEST FIT is Denver, Should Nuggets Gone Harder For Brown, PWAT News & More Tim Legler joins Harrison Wind of the DNVR Nuggets Podcast to break down the latest Denver Nuggets offseason rumors, including whether LeBron James’ best basketball fit could be next to Nikola Jokic in Denver. The crew dives into Peyton Watson’s restricted free agency, why P-Wat could be a must-sign starter for the Nuggets, and how his defense, athleticism, and upside impact the Jokic-Jamal Murray championship window. Legler also weighs in on Marvin Bagley’s role, Christian Braun’s bounce-back potential, and whether Denver should have gone harder after Jaylen Brown in a massive NBA trade swing.

videos.title: ⚽️ Crispy PROTEIN snack in 5 minutes! Gone before the match even kicks off!
videos.summary_source_text:
⚽️ Crispy PROTEIN snack in 5 minutes! Gone before the match even kicks off! ⚽️ Crispy PROTEIN snack in 5 minutes! Gone before the match even kicks off!

Alright — the World Cup is in full swing, so it's the perfect time to make a snack that's actually delicious and good for you.
3/4 cup (100 g) chickpea flour.
3/4 cup (180 ml) water.
1 tsp salt.
Give it a good whisk. You want a medium batter — not too thick, not too runny.
If it's a little loose, just add more chickpea flour, a spoon at a time, until it's right.
Want a flavor boost? Grate in some fresh garlic — totally optional, but trust me, it's so good.
Fresh dill or fresh rosemary.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 12 mins.
...until the edges are crispy and golden.
And that's it — crunchy, high-protein, guilt-free game-day snacks. Drop a comment and let me know how you'd rate this recipe. See you in the next one!

videos.title: DRINK APPLE CIDER VINEGAR FOR 14 DAYS… SEE WHAT HAPPENS | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
DRINK APPLE CIDER VINEGAR FOR 14 DAYS… SEE WHAT HAPPENS | Dr. Mandell Could one simple tablespoon of apple cider vinegar a day make a difference in your health? In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains what the science says about apple cider vinegar and how it may help support healthier blood sugar, appetite control, digestion, metabolic health, and overall wellness when used correctly. You'll learn why timing matters, the best way to take it, why drinking it straight is a mistake, how it may help reduce cravings, improve fullness after meals, and support healthy eating habits. We'll also discuss who should avoid apple cider vinegar, important safety precautions, and why consistency is far more important than taking larger amounts. Remember, apple cider vinegar is not a miracle cure, but when combined with a nutritious diet, regular exercise, quality sleep, stress management, and other healthy lifestyle habits, it can become another valuable tool to help you achieve better long-term health. Watch until the end to learn exactly how to use it safely and effectively so you can get the greatest potential benefits. As always, consult your healthcare provider before making significant dietary changes, especially if you have diabetes, kidney disease, stomach ulcers, severe acid reflux, or take medications that affect blood sugar. Stay healthy, my friends!

How To Get Rid of a Sore Throat in 2 Minutes How do you get rid of a sore throat in 1–2 minutes without pills, herbs, or medication? This acupressure technique focuses on applying pressure to the back of the neck directly opposite the location of the sore throat.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4orvtuZ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

The technique is simple:
• Find the location of the sore throat in the front of the neck
• Locate the matching point on the back of the neck
• Apply firm pressure for 1–2 minutes

This technique is designed to improve circulation, lymphatic flow, and nerve flow to help relieve a sore throat and keep it from coming back.

videos.title: Robertson’s Future, Ducks on the Clock, and Utah Matches ft. David Pagnotta & Michael Babcock Jr.
videos.summary_source_text:
Robertson’s Future, Ducks on the Clock, and Utah Matches ft. David Pagnotta & Michael Babcock Jr. On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by David Pagnotta of The Fourth Period and Daily Faceoff to break down the latest news, rumors, and movement from around the NHL. Jeff and David dive into the ongoing Jason Robertson situation with the Dallas Stars, the latest trade speculation across the league, key restricted free agents filing for arbitration, and what comes next after Leo Carlsson’s $90 million offer sheet with the Philadelphia Flyers as the Anaheim Ducks face a franchise-altering decision. Could more offer sheets be coming? Which NHL teams are still looking to make moves? Then, Michael Babcock Jr. joins the show after being named the new head coach of the Brantford Bulldogs, discussing his move into the OHL, joining the Bulldogs organization under Spencer Hyman and the Hyman family ownership group, building a winning culture, his coaching journey, and what fans can expect from Brantford this season. Jeff wraps up another packed episode covering the biggest stories shaping the NHL offseason.

#TheSheet #NHL #Hockey #NHLRumors #NHLTrades #DallasStars #AnaheimDucks #BrantfordBulldogs

videos.title: Would LeBron James joining the Nuggets be as big as when Peyton Manning joined the Denver Broncos?
videos.summary_source_text:
Would LeBron James joining the Nuggets be as big as when Peyton Manning joined the Denver Broncos? The history of the Denver Broncos changed when Peyton Manning chose them in free agency a decade and a half ago. Could LeBron James be the next superstar to choose Denver as his home?

The DNVR Broncos Crew relives the Peyton Manning signing and what LeBron James would bring to the Denver Nuggets.

Plus, ESPN’s voters snubbed J.K. Dobbins from the Top 10 running backs list. Is that fair? And Pat Surtain II is the league’s best cornerback, of course.

On the DNVR Broncos Podcast, Zac Stevens, Ryan Koenigsberg and Henry Chisholm are coming to you LIVE from the DNVR Bar to break down all of the latest news in Broncos Country.

videos.title: Claude Loops: Build Agents That Run Without You
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Loops: Build Agents That Run Without You Get the Agent OS & Agent Loop System 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Want to make money and save time with AI? Join here: https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Video notes + links to the tools 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Get a FREE AI Course + Community + 1,000 AI Agents 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-with-julian-goldie-1553/about

Get a FREE AI SEO Strategy Session → https://go.juliangoldie.com/strategy-session?utm=julian

Get 200+ Free AI SEO Prompts → https://go.juliangoldie.com/chat-gpt-prompts

Get out SEO link building book here 👉 https://go.juliangoldie.com/opt-in?utm=julian

5 Claude Agent Loops That Run Autonomously (Build, Plan, Ship, Watch News & Write SEO) | Agent OS

The script explains five autonomous “Claude agent loops” built inside an Agent OS that reduce manual prompting by using a repeatable cycle where an agent acts, an independent judge checks the work against a defined goal, and the loop repeats until it passes, optionally with a human approval step. The five loops include: a loop-engineering builder/judge setup to build deliverables to a spec while optimizing cost with different models; a Kanban workflow with planner, builder, and reviewer roles that moves tasks through triage, running, blocked, and done; a pipeline that takes ideas from inbox to shipped with one-time plan approval and saved outputs in a vault; an “Oracle” timed news loop that finds and ranks AI news and produces content hooks while logging to Obsidian memory; and an SEO pipeline that generates keywords and one-click SEO articles. videos.title: GPT-5.6 Sol Explained: Why You Can't Actually Use It Yet
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.6 Sol Explained: Why You Can't Actually Use It Yet Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Headlines say GPT-5.6 and Claude Fable 5 just launched — so why can't you use either one? One got pulled by its own government days after going live. The other was previewed to ~20 companies, then went quiet on a release date. In this video I separate what these models actually do from what's just a benchmark chart taped onto a marketing claim.

We break down GPT-5.6 Sol's new "max" and "ultra" sub-agent modes, the three-tier pricing (Sol / Terra / Luna), and that unconfirmed 1.5M-token context rumor — plus why both OpenAI and Anthropic got tangled in the same U.S. government review window within three weeks of each other. Every vendor claim here is flagged as a claim until an independent lab verifies it.

Skepticism-first, evidence-over-hype. That's the whole channel.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Neither Model Is Actually "Launched"
1:52 GPT-5.6 Sol: What OpenAI Is Actually Claiming
3:52 Pricing and the Access Problem
4:57 Why the Delay? The Government Got Involved
5:56 Enter Fable 5: Launched, Pulled, Relaunched
7:58 Head-to-Head: Where Each One Actually Wins
9:34 Real-World Use Cases: Who Should Actually Care
11:15 What This Actually Means Going Forward

🔔 Subscribe for skepticism-first AI analysis — I verify the benchmarks so you don't have to.

💬 Which model wins once both are fully in the wild? Drop your theory in the comments — I pull the best ones into follow-up videos.

videos.title: Can This ONE Golf Club Replace An Entire Bag? (8 Clubs In 1)
videos.summary_source_text:
Can This ONE Golf Club Replace An Entire Bag? (8 Clubs In 1) Can one adjustable golf club really replace an entire iron set? In this video, Rick puts the latest Q Club through its paces to find out whether this unique design is a genuine game-changer or just another golf gimmick. From different loft settings to on-course performance, we test whether one club really can do it all.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: New Toyota GR GT is a Porsche KILLER!
videos.summary_source_text:
New Toyota GR GT is a Porsche KILLER! Mat’s teamed up with Toyota for a walk around of the upcoming GR GT. He’ll run you through the design, the performance stats, the interior, and all the key things you need to know. He’ll also have a first look at the Lexus LFA Concept. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0807

Mat’s having his first look at the GR GT! 

It’s an all-new sports car that’s due for release in 2027, and Toyota’s invited Mat down for a look around the prototype version. So what have we learned so far? Let’s take a closer look…

In terms of the design, it’s a car where the production process started with the engineers in the wind tunnel, before it was handed over to the designers. As a result, every single vent you see on the outside is real! From the front to the side to the rear, this car is 100% stick of truth certified! What’s more, we believe there to be an active rear wing around the back, although we couldn’t see it in action with this prototype. It’s also covered in GR and GT badges across the exterior, but no Toyota badges. That’s because GR is now an individual sub-brand, so the official name of the car will simply be GR GT - not the Toyota GR GT! 

When you step into the interior, the first thing you’ll notice are the set of carbon fibre bucket seats. These come fitted with red seat belts, and there are red elements throughout the rest of the cabin - a reflection of this car being a GR development. It comes with a sports steering wheel with a flat bottom, which also has a drive mode selector fitted to it. There’s Alcantara across the dash and roof lining, and there’s also physical buttons below the infotainment screen! We haven’t seen the infotainment screen or digital dials in action yet, although they will be shared in due course. 

Under the bonnet will sit a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 hybrid. We know it will produce more than 650hp and 850Nm, although we don’t have final figures yet. Toyota also claim that the GR GT will have a top speed of at least 199mph - so you can guarantee the final car will exceed 200mph! 

But the GR GT isn’t the only car Mat’s gone to see - he’ll also be having a look around the all-new Lexus LFA Concept! But what can he reveal about this all-new car? You’ll need to stick with Mat and see for yourself! Mat’s teamed up with Toyota for a walk around of the upcoming GR GT. videos.title: 🚨 Jason Robertson Drama Reaches New Level
videos.summary_source_text:
🚨 Jason Robertson Drama Reaches New Level Jason Robertson and the Dallas Stars have officially reached a new chapter in their contract saga as Robertson files for salary arbitration, adding even more uncertainty to one of the NHL's biggest offseason storylines.

The DLLS Stars crew is joined by Dallas Stars senior beat writer Mike Heika to break down what arbitration means, why negotiations have reached this point, and how it impacts the Stars' roster and salary cap moving forward. The crew also discusses how long the process could take, whether a long-term extension is still possible, and if there's any chance Robertson could be playing somewhere other than Dallas next season. If you've been told to keep the club low and slow your whole golfing life, this video is going to change how you start your golf swing. Eric Cogorno and JT Thomas break down why low and slow causes golfers to move the body and club together — and why that makes everything harder later in the swing. The fix is early wrist hinge in the backswing: getting the club head moving sooner so you can create separation in transition, stay on plane, and hit the ball more solid. Watch how Adam Scott and Nelly Korda use wrist hinge in the golf swing to get the club head above the hip line early — and how the lead hand drill gives you the same feel in minutes. If you leave this video without trying the lead hand drill, you're leaving solid contact on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why low and slow in the golf takeaway causes more problems than it solves
• How moving the body and club together early leads to a worse transition and less solid contact
• The correct wrist hinge in the backswing: hands below hip line, club head above
• How Adam Scott and Nelly Korda use early wrist hinge in the golf swing to stay on plane
• The lead hand drill for training wrist hinge in the backswing from day one
• How early wrist hinge gets the club on plane from down the line
• How the body pivot and hand path create width without sacrificing wrist hinge in the golf swing
• Why getting the club head moving sooner leads to better iron compression and more distance

videos.title: How 115 million Americans Got Chronic Disease Overnight (Without Getting Any Sicker)
videos.summary_source_text:
How 115 million Americans Got Chronic Disease Overnight (Without Getting Any Sicker) The chronic disease epidemic in the U.S. is not caused by what you think. Discover why overdiagnosis is so common and why chronic disease diagnoses continue to rise. 

0:00 The chronic disease epidemic 
1:03 Diabetes, cholesterol, and hypertension diagnosis
1:18 Hypertension diagnosis changes
1:41 Cholesterol guidelines changes 
2:17 Diabetes and prediabetes
2:48 Overdiagnosis controversy
4:34 Does overdiagnosis help? 
5:46 What causes insulin resistance and chronic illness? 
6:18 Type 2 diabetes reversal
6:51 How to lower cholesterol naturally
7:50 How to lower blood pressure

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4w1Osiz

Learn more about the factors that influence healthy blood pressure in this article: https://drbrg.co/4foKfzv

Explore more videos on nutrition, lifestyle, and the root causes of chronic disease:
▶️ https://youtu.be/oEl1YABvfx0
▶️ https://youtu.be/jFVme1N_wVE
▶️ https://youtu.be/Qgwu_-6wy40

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

If you’re dealing with chronic disease symptoms, understanding the root cause is critical, but it’s often overlooked. One of the best ways to identify the root cause is to determine when your symptoms began, and what happened just before that.

In 2017, more than 31 million people were diagnosed with hypertension overnight without any actual change in their blood pressure. Instead, the diagnostic definition of high blood pressure changed.

Similar trends have occurred with cholesterol and diabetes. In 1988, an LDL level of 190 was considered normal. By 2001, that threshold had dropped to 130, and statin prescriptions doubled. The classification for high cholesterol dropped again in 2013. 

Prediabetes was also introduced as a diagnostic category, and today more than 115 million Americans have diabetes or prediabetes.

Expanded diagnostic classifications have not translated into longer life expectancy. Chronically elevated insulin may be at the root of many chronic illnesses, and a high-carbohydrate diet can keep insulin levels elevated.

Natural approaches and lifestyle factors are not always addressed when someone receives a chronic disease diagnosis.

If you’re dealing with chronic disease symptoms, understanding the root cause is critical, but it’s often overlooked. One of the best ways to identify the root cause is to determine when your symptoms began, and what happened just before that.

In 2017, more than 31 million people were diagnosed with hypertension overnight without any actual change in their blood pressure. Instead, the diagnostic definition of high blood pressure changed.

Similar trends have occurred with cholesterol and diabetes. In 1988, an LDL level of 190 was considered normal. By 2001, that threshold had dropped to 130, and statin prescriptions doubled. The classification for high cholesterol dropped again in 2013. 

Prediabetes was also introduced as a diagnostic category, and today more than 115 million Americans have diabetes or prediabetes.

Expanded diagnostic classifications have not translated into longer life expectancy. Chronically elevated insulin may be at the root of many chronic illnesses, and a high-carbohydrate diet can keep insulin levels elevated.

Natural approaches and lifestyle factors are not always addressed when someone receives a chronic disease diagnosis.

videos.title: The Tuck and Turn Move That Fixes Your Over-the-Top Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
The Tuck and Turn Move That Fixes Your Over-the-Top Swing Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Most players tuck their trail elbow in the backswing and let it fly out in the downswing — it's backwards, and it's costing you a straight ball flight.

This video shows the "tuck and turn": keeping the elbow out in the backswing, then tucking it in transition so the shaft shallows out naturally.

After a few reps of this feel, you'll be swinging under the shallowing line on the Blue Brick and hitting straighter shots or a slight draw instead of a slice.

We used the Blue Brick to give instant visual feedback on shaft plane during the drill.

Like this video if you're going to try this, and check the link in my bio for your own Blue Brick.

The BEST golf ball to improve your putting 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: OFFER SHEET CHAOS! Carolina Hurricanes Rumored to be Interested in Simon Edvinsson
videos.summary_source_text:
OFFER SHEET CHAOS! Carolina Hurricanes Rumored to be Interested in Simon Edvinsson During the mega final episode of 32 Thoughts before the summer break, Elliotte Freidman stated that the Carolina Hurricanes were looking to offer sheet a couple of players. One of them as Leo Carlsson, but the one that caught everyone's attention was Detroit Red Wings' Simon Edvinsson. That being said, does it make sense for the Hurricanes to offer sheet for Edvinsson, and would the Red Wings match it? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the news of the Hurricanes being interested in Edvinsson. While they are still figure out what to do with Alexander Nikishin, does going after Edvinsson makes sense if nothing works out? Secondly, if the Hurricanes do off sheet hime, how would that work overall with cap space and pick compensation to the Wings? Plus, how would this change the dynamics of the Hurricanes moving forward if this does play out? Finally, Zach concludes the show by shares his thoughts on where the team is at currently. While they have not made many moves, there is a sense that this will be more quieter than usual when it comes to roster constructon that summers past. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 07.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
07.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: The two-quarterback debate + 5 other factors that will impact CSU’s ceiling in 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
The two-quarterback debate + 5 other factors that will impact CSU’s ceiling in 2026 Justin Michael opens up with some thoughts on the USMNT coming up short, plus a brief update on how Nique Clifford and Isaiah Stevens are doing in NBA Summer League and Trey McBride’s controversial interview. Justin then talks about QB Anthoney Hill in Remember that Ram before moving the discussion to Hauss Hejny and K’Saan Farrar. Justin talks about the pros and cons of not having an established starter, plus why he’s genuinely excited about both guys. Finally, Justin gives out five other key factors that will impact the success of CSU’s QB’s in 2026.

videos.title: Hindi - 07.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 07.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: The Avalanche Explored a Hellebuyck Trade. What Young Guns Could Step Up This Season?
videos.summary_source_text:
The Avalanche Explored a Hellebuyck Trade. What Young Guns Could Step Up This Season? Colorado Avalanche considered a blockbuster move for Connor Hellebuyck, eyeing a league-altering goalie upgrade that could have reshaped the Stanley Cup race. Could bringing the “world’s best goalie” to Denver have changed the Avalanche’s trajectory? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the rumors from Elliotte Friedman’s 32 Thoughts, exploring trade logistics, potential assets on the move, and how Hellebuyck in net might have meant no regression for Colorado.

The hosts debate Mackenzie Blackwood’s place, Scott Wedgwood’s breakout season, and the Avalanche’s commitment to a modern goaltending tandem versus superstar contracts. Discussion shifts to Colorado’s youth movement: Can players like Gavin Brinley and Taylor Makar seize NHL roles in a “win-now” environment? Insightful takes on prospect opportunities, roster construction, and playoff implications make this a can’t-miss listen for fans tracking the Avalanche’s quest for hockey supremacy.

James Carey Lauder-Imagn Images

videos.title: Wyndham Clark Hate Needs to Stop + The U.S. Was the Perfect FIFA World Cup Host | Closed Course
videos.summary_source_text:
Wyndham Clark Hate Needs to Stop + The U.S. Was the Perfect FIFA World Cup Host | Closed Course Welcome back to another episode of Closed Course!

The gang is back together for another episode talking golf, the FIFA World Cup, and big plans for the summer.

The excitement surrounding the FIFA World Cup continues to grow as the knockout rounds progress. The guys discuss Team USA's impressive run and their chances of hanging on for the remainder of the tournament. They also talk about the success of the United States hosting the FIFA World Cup and how people from around the world have responded to their time in the U.S. Regardless of who advances, the tournament is set to deliver entertaining football all the way to the final.

The guys also discuss recent professional golf tournaments, specifically the U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club, where Colorado native Wyndham Clark captured his second U.S. Open Championship. Despite a very successful tournament for Clark, it didn't come easy, as he received heavy criticism and scrutiny for his past actions. The hosts discuss the unnecessary hate Clark receives and why golf fans should move on from mistakes he's made in the past.

From golf talk and World Cup banter to must-hear stories from Blake's wedding in Croatia, this is a must-listen episode of the Closed Course Podcast.

Tune in every Tuesday for new episodes of Closed Course.

Powered by Pins & Aces

videos.title: AI Can FINALLY Edit Videos For You
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Can FINALLY Edit Videos For You Imagine typing "edit this for me" and letting AI handle your entire video timeline. 🤯

That's the promise behind Palmier (not sponsored), a new AI video editor powered by Claude. From organizing media and trimming clips to generating missing B-roll on the fly, it’s designed to automate the manual side of editing.

At $29/month for around 3 to 7 minutes of generated video, it's not the cheapest product to use, especially when you factor in potential revisions. BUT it's still probably cheaper than a professional video editor. 

I haven’t run any footage through it yet, but I'm curious to see how it performs and if it's worth it. Let me know in the comments if you'd want to see a hands-on test 👇🏻

videos.title: The MacKinnon Evasion Pattern
videos.summary_source_text:
The MacKinnon Evasion Pattern The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Why Coach Prime is PISSED OFF & Moving Different for Colorado in 2026 | Inside Big 12 Media Day
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Coach Prime is PISSED OFF & Moving Different for Colorado in 2026 | Inside Big 12 Media Day Coach Prime and the Colorado Buffaloes are moving different in 2026 after a humbling 3-9 season, and Big 12 Media Day showed why Deion Sanders is pissed off, healthy, and ready to prove everyone wrong. From Julian Lewis’ growth under Brennan Marion to Danny Scudero’s breakout potential, Ben Finneseth’s leadership, Naeten Mitchell’s edge, and a Buffs roster embracing the underdog role, Colorado football feels like it has a new urgency heading into the Big 12 season. We break down the biggest takeaways from Frisco, why the dimmer spotlight could help CU, and how Coach Prime’s renewed energy could change everything for the Buffs in 2026. Jake Schwanitz & Scott Procter go inside Big 12 Media day for the latest Coach Prime & Colorado Football News.

videos.summary_source_text:
10 ChatGPT Secrets I Wish I Knew Sooner *Free ChatGPT at Work Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/2r71

I walk through how I use ChatGPT to do real work for me with simple advanced hacks.

I show how I use ChatGPT Skills to save my brand colors, font, and logo, so ChatGPT can make on-brand images for me each time. I also show how I use ChatGPT connectors with Google Drive, Dropbox, Gmail, Slack, and other apps so ChatGPT can find files and help with real tasks.

I go step by step through ChatGPT memory, projects, project sources, meeting recordings, tasks, spreadsheets, dashboards, image editing, and agent mode. I also show how ChatGPT can clean a messy spreadsheet and turn it into an interactive dashboard with filters.

This video is for anyone who wants to use ChatGPT in a better way. You do not need to know code. You do not need to be technical. I keep it simple and show how ChatGPT can help with work, files, meetings, marketing images, research, and daily tasks.

I also share prompt ideas you can use in your own ChatGPT account. These ChatGPT tips can help you save time, stay organized, and get more done with AI. *Free ChatGPT at Work Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/2r71

videos.title: What Is Your Food Telling Your Body?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Is Your Food Telling Your Body? Every time you eat, your body is listening. Food doesn't just provide fuel, it sends signals that influence hormones, metabolism, and the way your body functions. That's why nutrition is about more than counting calories. It's about understanding the message you're sending with every meal.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. He is also the founder and medical director of Cardiovascular Interventions, PA, where since 1990 he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor. Throughout his distinguished career, he has performed thousands of interventional procedures in both hospital and outpatient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease. He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Every time you eat, your body is listening. videos.title: THE #1 WAY TO HELP FADE DARK SPOTS | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
THE #1 WAY TO HELP FADE DARK SPOTS | Dr. Mandell Dark spots, age spots, acne marks, and uneven skin tone can be frustrating, but one of the most effective skincare ingredients is also one of the simplest and most affordable. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains the science behind vitamin C serum and how it may help brighten your complexion, reduce the appearance of hyperpigmentation, support collagen production, and protect your skin from everyday environmental damage. You'll learn why dark spots develop, how melanin is produced, the important role of the enzyme tyrosinase, and why vitamin C has become one of the most recommended ingredients by skincare professionals.

I also explain exactly what to look for when purchasing a vitamin C serum. Choose a product containing 10% to 20% vitamin C, preferably L-ascorbic acid, which is considered the most researched and effective form of vitamin C for the skin. Look for a serum packaged in a dark amber, opaque, or air-tight bottle, since light and oxygen can break down vitamin C and reduce its effectiveness. If the serum changes from clear or light yellow to dark orange or brown, it has oxidized and should be replaced. Remember, the most expensive product isn't always the best—many excellent vitamin C serums are affordable and available at Walmart, Target, CVS, Walgreens, Costco, Ulta Beauty, Sephora, Amazon, and most pharmacies.

You'll also learn exactly how to apply vitamin C serum, when to use it, how often to use it, why sunscreen is essential to prevent new pigmentation from forming, and how consistency is the key to achieving brighter, smoother, healthier-looking skin. Most people who respond begin noticing improvements within four to eight weeks, while deeper pigmentation may take longer. Healthy skin is not about finding one miracle product—it's about understanding the science, protecting your skin every day, and following a routine that works. If you notice rapidly changing skin lesions, irregular pigmentation, bleeding spots, or persistent discoloration, be sure to consult your dermatologist for a proper evaluation. If you found this video helpful, please subscribe, like, and share it with someone who wants healthier, younger-looking skin naturally.

videos.title: Carlsson Offer Sheet Fallout and the NHL Player Empowerment Era ft. Tyler Johnson & Greg Wyshynski
videos.summary_source_text:
Carlsson Offer Sheet Fallout and the NHL Player Empowerment Era ft. Tyler Johnson & Greg Wyshynski On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by Greg Wyshynski for another edition of MVSW (Marek vs. Wyshynski) as they break down the biggest stories shaking up the NHL offseason. Jeff and Greg dive into Leo Carlsson’s massive offer sheet with the Philadelphia Flyers, the ticking seven-day window for the Anaheim Ducks to make their decision, and how Pavel Mintyukov’s new contract impacts Anaheim’s salary cap situation moving forward. They discuss whether offer sheets are becoming a bigger weapon for NHL general managers, how teams are exploiting market inefficiencies, and which restricted free agents could become the next targets.

Then, two-time Stanley Cup champion Tyler Johnson joins the show to give a player’s perspective on the changing era of player empowerment in the NHL. Johnson discusses how players inside the Flyers and Ducks locker rooms might view Danny Briere’s aggressive offer sheet strategy, Leo Carlsson’s decision to sign, and what these moves mean from a player perspective. Plus, the guys dive into the latest around Brady Tkachuk, player podcasts, trade requests, Dylan Larkin’s reported preferred destinations, Zach Werenski rumours, no-trade clauses, and how much power NHL stars have in today’s league.

Jeff Marek, Greg Wyshynski, and Tyler Johnson cover all that and more on another loaded offseason edition of The Sheet.

#TheSheet #NHL #Hockey #Flyers #FlyTogether #FlyersHockey #AnaheimDucks #LetsGoDucks #LeoCarlsson #NHLOffseason #NHLFreeAgency #StanleyCup

videos.title: Shoot The Puck: Alfons Freij – JVM-generalen
videos.summary_source_text:
Shoot The Puck: Alfons Freij – JVM-generalen Shoot The Puck är en podcast available HockeyNews.se

Alfons Freij var en av Juniorkronornas guldhjältar i Minnesota och den karismatiske hockeytalangerna fick ett stort genombrott i Sverige – inte minst efter att han fick ett samtal av guldmedaljen mitt i firandet.
Nu gästar hockeytalangen podcasten Shoot The Puck med Hockeynews Henrik Sjöberg.

Ur innehållet:
2.00: Golfsommaren pågår
9.45: JVM i backspegeln – gåshud och känslor
11.25: Skills eller lagkänsla – därför vann Juniorkronorna guld
12.35: Därför ringde guldmedaljen mitt i firandet
15.00: 25 000 nya följare på Instagram

videos.title: I Built an AI Radio Phone In Line (Grok Voice)
videos.summary_source_text:
I Built an AI Radio Phone In Line (Grok Voice) I just gave Grok Voice its own phone number. In this build I wire xAI's brand new Voice Agent Builder into Twilio, so an AI answers, screens the caller, and lines them up to go on air. Name, location and question straight onto a lower third. I'll show you what the launch handles for you in about two minutes, what's still on you to build, and the gotchas nobody mentions... consent, mix minus, and the one setting that stops trolls torching your bill. Original build, no recycled clips. Grab a coffee. We're doing this live.

videos.title: Koenigsegg Gemera: 2 300 hk, V8, plats för fyra! Plus Legobilen!
videos.summary_source_text:
Koenigsegg Gemera: 2 300 hk, V8, plats för fyra! Plus Legobilen! Den första kundbilen av Koenigsegg Gemera är äntligen färdig för leverans till den första kunden – och ställdes ut på The Aurora 2026.
Ytterligare 299 väntar på sin bil.
Och vilken bil! Totalt 2 300 hk med en V8 på 1 500 hk och tre elmotorer, torque vectoring på alla hjul, bakhjulsstyrning, dubbla mugghållare för alla och plats för fyra kabinväskor.
0–100 km/h på 1,9 sekunder.
Jag tar också en titt på världens snabbaste Legobil, en Koenigsegg Sadairs Spear – som man kan köpa stt eget exemplar av – måvara lite mindre och byggd av färre delar. 

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Most people are using AI completely wrong.
Google Gemini Gems let you create permanent AI experts that remember your files, goals, and preferences—no repeated prompts, no re-uploading documents.

In this video, I break down what Google Gemini Gems are, why they’re fundamentally different from ChatGPT and custom GPTs, and how you can build three powerful AI experts in under 15 minutes:

A Bureaucracy Buster for government paperwork
A Finance Coach that analyzes your real spending habits
A Career Growth Engine that runs live mock interviews

We’ll cover:
How Gemini Gems work behind the scenes
Gemini’s massive 1–2 million token memory advantage
Living Document connectivity with Google Docs & Sheets
Real-world use cases that save hours every week
Gemini Gems vs ChatGPT GPTs (honest comparison)
Privacy, data governance, and what Google actually does with your data

videos.title: Upper Body Power Drill – Ball First Board
videos.summary_source_text:
Upper Body Power Drill – Ball First Board Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. Most golfers only throw their hips through the downswing and leave a ton of power on the table — real speed comes from your upper body joining in too.

This video uses a simple kettlebell throw analogy to show how your whole body, not just your hips, creates the momentum you need to really rip it.

You'll learn how to let your upper body follow your hips at the top of the swing so all that momentum transfers through impact, giving you more speed and distance without changing your swing mechanics.

We used the Ball First Board to help feel and confirm this correct sequencing at the top of the swing.

Like this video if you want more distance, and check the link in my bio for the Ball First Board.

Drink 1 Cup Per Day to Lower Blood Sugar Want to lower your blood sugar naturally? Try this simple drink once a day for 7 days.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4aSAerA

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Add this to a glass of water:
• 1 tablespoon apple cider vinegar
• A pinch of cinnamon

Apple cider vinegar helps stabilize blood sugar, reduce appetite, and slow the breakdown of carbohydrates into glucose. Cinnamon helps support insulin sensitivity and blood sugar regulation.

For even better results, pair it with a walk after your meal. Better blood sugar control may also help with:
• Brain fog
• Energy
• Cravings
• Hunger

videos.title: Peugeot 408 Review: DON’T buy an SUV before watching this!
videos.summary_source_text:
Peugeot 408 Review: DON’T buy an SUV before watching this! This is our in-depth review of the updated Peugeot 408, reviewing the exterior design changes and additions to the interior, while also discussing how much it costs and what it’s like to drive. 

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

This is the new Peugeot 408! 

The 408 has undergone a mid-life facelift, so rather than undergoing a full overhaul, a couple of features and elements have been updated. 

The question is, are the updates enough to steer you away from key competitors like the Cupra Formentor? Let’s take a closer look…

Starting with the design, there are a couple of updates, most notably at the front. There’s an all-new grille, while the front air intakes have also been updated. The long, fang-like DRLs have also been removed, instead replaced with smaller, 3-line lights. Along the side, there are new alloy wheels, and around the back, the badge has been replaced with the brand’s name in the full-length light bar. 

On the inside, Peugeot has kept the interior more or less the same as the previous iteration. There are some new materials high up on the dash, new kick plates have been added, and new dial screen graphics have been added. Otherwise, it’s the same as before, which means there’s a laggy and unintuitive infotainment screen, a decent amount of storage, and a customisable screen for your key features and functions. 

There are two engine options available for the 408, and they’re both hybrids. The entry-level is a 1.2-litre petrol coupled with a self-charging motor, and this produces 145hp. There’s also a 1.6-litre plug-in hybrid, and this produces 240hp. Both cars are front wheel drive. 

The entry-level 408 starts from around £32,000, rising all the way to £38,760 for the range-topper. So is it worth it? You’ll need to stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-07-07

Mat's Peugeot 408 choice: https://bit.ly/Mats-Choice-070726

18:06 Verdict: Should you buy the new Peugeot 408? This is our in-depth review of the updated Peugeot 408, reviewing the exterior design changes and additions to the interior, while also discussing how much it costs and what it’s like to drive. 

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

This is the new Peugeot 408! 

The 408 has undergone a mid-life facelift, so rather than undergoing a full overhaul, a couple of features and elements have been updated. 

The question is, are the updates enough to steer you away from key competitors like the Cupra Formentor? Let’s take a closer look…

Starting with the design, there are a couple of updates, most notably at the front. There’s an all-new grille, while the front air intakes have also been updated. The long, fang-like DRLs have also been removed, instead replaced with smaller, 3-line lights. Along the side, there are new alloy wheels, and around the back, the badge has been replaced with the brand’s name in the full-length light bar. 

On the inside, Peugeot has kept the interior more or less the same as the previous iteration. There are some new materials high up on the dash, new kick plates have been added, and new dial screen graphics have been added. Otherwise, it’s the same as before, which means there’s a laggy and unintuitive infotainment screen, a decent amount of storage, and a customisable screen for your key features and functions. 

There are two engine options available for the 408, and they’re both hybrids. The entry-level is a 1.2-litre petrol coupled with a self-charging motor, and this produces 145hp. There’s also a 1.6-litre plug-in hybrid, and this produces 240hp. Both cars are front wheel drive. 

The entry-level 408 starts from around £32,000, rising all the way to £38,760 for the range-topper. So is it worth it? You’ll need to stick with Mat to see for yourself!

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-07-07

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

• Amazing golf courses

videos.summary_source_text:
Finansdagen 2025 – Omställning i en föränderlig värld Välkommen till Finansdagen 2025! Här får du ta del av insiktsfulla föreläsningar, inspirerande samtal och aktuella analyser om finansbranschens möjligheter och utmaningar. I årets upplaga samlas ledande experter, branschprofiler och beslutsfattare för att dela sina perspektiv kring ekonomi, hållbarhet och framtidens finansiella landskap. Oavsett om du är yrkesverksam inom finans, student eller bara nyfiken på de senaste trenderna, ger Finansdagen 2025 dig kunskap och inspiration att ta nästa steg. 

Dagen leds av moderatorerna Hanne Setane, Hampus Engzell och Måns Liljenlov, PwC Sverige. Keynote Michael Green, vd Handelsbanken, intervjuas av Måns Liljenlov, PwC. Hur påverkas branschen av olika omvärlstrender, geopolitik, makroekonomis ka läget och hållbarhetsagendan? Panelsamtal med Frida Wallnor, politisk redaktör DI, Jens Magnusson, chefsekonom SEB, Emilia Högquist, hållbarhetschef Finansinspektionen.

videos.summary_source_text:
Finansdagen 2025 – Omställning: Teknikutveckling Välkommen till Finansdagen 2025! Här får du ta del av insiktsfulla föreläsningar, inspirerande samtal och aktuella analyser om finansbranschens möjligheter och utmaningar. I årets upplaga samlas ledande experter, branschprofiler och beslutsfattare för att dela sina perspektiv kring ekonomi, hållbarhet och framtidens finansiella landskap. Oavsett om du är yrkesverksam inom finans, student eller bara nyfiken på de senaste trenderna, ger Finansdagen 2025 dig kunskap och inspiration att ta nästa steg. 

Vad är möjligt med AI och hur möjliggör vi en säker användning? 

Keynote och samtal med Caroline Leijonhufvud, Strategic Client Account Executive FS Oracle, Johan Vieweg, Business Developer and AI Strategist SEB. 

Se fler avsnitt från dagen och ladda ned material på vår webbplats https://www.pwc.se/finansdagen. Missa inte chansen att ta del av de viktigaste samtalen inom finansvärlden!

videos.title: 06.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
06.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Fix The Stuck Move In Your Downswing – Blue Brick
videos.summary_source_text:
Fix The Stuck Move In Your Downswing – Blue Brick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. This one's for better players who already know how to shallow the club and hit a draw but still fight getting "stuck" in the downswing.

You'll learn the difference between the stuck move (butt end riding up, shaft dropping under) and the correct move (butt end working down and in, shaft kicking on top) — the same move you see pros like Tommy Fleetwood drill.

Once you feel this, you'll be able to release the club as hard as you want without any fear of hooking it — the ball will go straight or fade.

We used the Blue Brick to help groove the correct path and shaft angle during the drill.

Like this video if this helped, and grab your own Blue Brick using the link in my bio.

videos.title: ROSTER UPDATES! Carolina Hurricanes Heading to Arbitration & Sign a New Netminder
videos.summary_source_text:
ROSTER UPDATES! Carolina Hurricanes Heading to Arbitration & Sign a New Netminder As we start a new week in the offseason, what's the latest news surrounding the Carolina Hurricanes? Between arbitration, a new signing, and a way too early roster projection, how are things shaping up in Raleigh? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the news of Ronan Seeley electing for arbitration. Earlier in the week, the Hurricanes gave Seeley a qualifying offer, along with six other players. However, he decided to go to arbitration on Sunday. What could that look like for both sides? Secondly, the Hurricanes signed netminder Zach Sawchenko to a one-year, two-way deal on Saturday. What does it mean for both sides as the Hurricanes look to shore up the depth in the crease? Finally, Zach gives his way too early roster line projection ahead of the 2026-27 season. While we are only a few days into free agency and following the draft, what could the team look like? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Vad kostar mat för en familj egentligen?
videos.summary_source_text:
Vad kostar mat för en familj egentligen? Konsumentverket räknar med runt 2 800 kr i matkostnad per vuxen och månad, och kanske tiotusen för en familj med två vuxna och två barn. Min egen erfarenhet stämmer sällan med den ramen.

En del av förklaringen är våra egna val, som att handla på en dyrare butik för bekvämlighetens skull. Samtidigt hör jag liknande siffror från många i min omgivning, ofta 15 000 till 20 000 i månaden för en familj.

Det väcker en intressant fråga om hur väl schablonerna speglar verkliga hushåll. Jag är nyfiken på hur det ser ut för andra.
